policy.rest_relocation_note: Cabarrus and municipal REST services may move during ongoing service reorganization. If a URL fails, inspect the service root, layer ID, fallback URLs, and source registry before marking unavailable.
policy.concord_scope_note: Concord Central Area Plan sources are Concord/Central Area only and must not be treated as countywide future land use.
policy.utility_proxy_note: WSACC/RevalMap sewer/manhole/district layers are proximity/service-context proxies only. They do not provide true capacity, allocation, remaining capacity, or buildability guarantees.
